title: qa-crash-correlator inventory
description: Structured crash/failure inventory parsed from UE logs, callstacks, ensure/check output, and automation failure logs. Read-only parsing — no root-causing, no fixing; qa-bug-hunter consumes this.

signature.description: deduped identity: top user-code frame + exception type

suspected_module.description: game module/subsystem the top user frame belongs to

first_seen.description: log/build identifier where this signature first appears

unparsed_failures.description: failures that didn't match any pattern — never silently dropped
